untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of parallel trendlines with specific angle and slope characteristics, plus explicit reversal signal identification at channel boundaries. The allowed indicators do not include trendline detection, slope measurement, or explicit parallel line formation. Donchian channels used as proxy for price channel bounds, but true parallel trendline pattern recognition is not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Used Donchian Channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) as a reasonable approximation of channel boundaries for price bouncing behavior. Entry conditions detect price within channel; exit conditions trigger on channel boundary breaks. However, this loses the critical pattern elements: (1) exact parallel trendline slopes, (2) 45-degree angle detection, (3) explicit reversal signal confirmation. The reversal_continuation_rates data (69%R/31%C at low, 62%R/38%C at middle, 56%R/44%C at high) could not be encoded as they require price position context within the channel that is not available as structured indicators.
